scripts.assets: node scripts/sync-icon.js && capacitor-assets generate --iconBackgroundColor '#6C63FF' --iconBackgroundColorDark '#0D0D1A' --splashBackgroundColor '#6C63FF' --splashBackgroundColorDark '#0D0D1A' && node scripts/copy-icons.js
scripts.android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && node scripts/setup-ios-onesignal.js && npx cap open ios
scripts.sync:ios: npx cap sync ios && node scripts/setup-ios-onesignal.js
